command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.201 "cat >> ~/homepage/config/services.yaml << 'YAMLEOF'
    - MCP Services:
        href: http://192.168.0.201:3008
        description: SSH into vm-mcp-services
        icon: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/walkxcode/dashboard-icons/png/terminal.png
YAMLEOF
echo done"
